description.value:
Prerequisite: Strong, Agile, or Tough Hero, or Strong, Agile, or Tough Hero Training, Level 4+, Not a Fighter

You have trained yourself in the rigors of martial combat, increasing your will to fight and mastering useful combat maneuvers.

  • Gain Basic and Historical Equipment proficiency if you do not already have them.

  • You can take the Second Wind action as a Bonus action.

  • Gain the Combat Maneuver talent from the Fighter class, and make a single selection of the listed combat maneuvers.
